author: y4rr
content:
Landed core sampling API; beam search + speculative decoding split out to #612.

## What landed in \`ferrotorch-llama/src/generation.rs\`

### \`GenerationConfig\`
Bundles all sampling knobs:
- \`max_new_tokens\` ‚Äî hard cap on output length
- \`temperature\` ‚Äî \`0.0\` triggers greedy, \`> 0.0\` enables stochastic sampling
- \`top_k\` ‚Äî keep only top-k logits (\`0\` disables)
- \`top_p\` ‚Äî nucleus sampling: keep smallest set of top-prob tokens with cumulative mass ‚â• \`top_p\` (\`1.0\` disables)
- \`repetition_penalty\` ‚Äî Keskar et al. 2019; \`> 1.0\` discourages repeats, applies to ALL prior tokens (prompt + already-generated)
- \`eos_token_ids\` ‚Äî stop on any of these
- \`seed\` ‚Äî Optional RNG seed; same prompt + same config + same seed = same output

Helper constructors: \`GenerationConfig::greedy(n)\`, \`::sampling(n, temp)\`, \`::nucleus(n, top_p, temp)\`.

### Public API
- \`generate(model, prompt, &config) -> Vec<u32>\` ‚Äî return all new tokens (prompt excluded)
- \`generate_with_streamer(model, prompt, &config, &mut FnMut(u32) -> bool)\` ‚Äî invoke callback per token, stop early on \`false\`
- Low-level primitives: \`apply_temperature\`, \`top_k_filter\`, \`top_p_filter\`, \`apply_repetition_penalty\`, \`argmax\`, \`sample_softmax\` (all in-place on \`&mut [f64]\`). Callers can mix them with \`model.forward_from_ids\` for fully-custom loops.

### Filter pipeline
\`logits ‚Üí repetition_penalty ‚Üí temperature ‚Üí top_k ‚Üí top_p ‚Üí softmax ‚Üí categorical sample\`. Each stage is no-op-on-default (\`temperature=1\`, \`top_k=0\`, \`top_p=1\`, \`repetition_penalty=1\`), so callers can opt in piecemeal.

### Numerically-stable softmax
Subtract max before \`exp\` to prevent overflow. If every logit is \`-inf\` (e.g. all filtered out by an aggressive top-k or top-p), \`sample_softmax\` falls back to argmax instead of producing NaN.

## Tests (12 new)
- \`argmax_picks_highest\`
- \`temperature_scales_logits\`
- \`top_k_keeps_only_k\` and \`top_k_zero_is_noop\`
- \`top_p_keeps_just_enough_mass\` and \`top_p_one_is_noop\`
- \`repetition_penalty_downweights_seen_tokens\` and the negative-logit case
- \`sample_softmax_with_one_finite_logit_picks_it\` (deterministic when only one option survives the filter)
- \`sample_softmax_all_neg_inf_falls_back_to_argmax\` (graceful degenerate case)
- \`sample_softmax_distribution_matches_probs_loosely\` (1000-draw frequency check on skewed logits)
- \`generation_config_helpers\` (preset constructors)

12 generation tests pass. \`cargo test --workspace --no-fail-fast --features cuda\`: zero regressions.

## Out of scope ‚Üí #612
- Beam search (multiple parallel candidate sequences ranked by cumulative log-prob, length normalization)
- Speculative decoding (draft + target model, prob-ratio acceptance)

Both make sense to land together once the kv-cache / paging story is more settled ‚Äî they both interact with the cache lifecycle.
